products.name: Riso Carnaroli
pros: Large, tapered grains that absorb sauces well
Excellent al dente retention for risotto and salads
Recommended by Altroconsumo in November 2025 laboratory tests

products.name: Riso Basmati
pros: Long, slender grains with distinct aroma
Ideal for aromatic dishes and pilaf
Recommended by Altroconsumo in November 2025 laboratory tests

trustedSourceSummary: No official consumer documents were found in the last 60 days, so the latest available official sources from 2025-2026 were used. Organizations used: Altroconsumo. Altroconsumo’s November 2025 laboratory tests recommend Riso Carnaroli and Riso Basmati as top choices for their cooking performance and flavor.
